context.brand_promise: To give people the power to hold on to what matters and share it with the people who matter most.
context.voice: Warm, approachable, intelligent. Clear, jargon-free, human. Helpful guide, not know-it-all expert.

design_system.source_of_truth: Figma file PAQpnxQZENNwbhmk5qxOjR — Allura Primitives collection

deep_navy.usage: Primary brand — trust, depth, intelligence. Buttons, headers, nav.

coral.usage: Action — warmth, energy. Primary CTAs, active states, highlights.

trust_green.usage: Success, growth, positive reinforcement. Approved status.

clarity_blue.usage: Information, calm. Links, info badges, graph nodes.

task.description: Design a high-fidelity mockup of the Allura Memory Dashboard — a clean, governed interface for viewing, searching, and managing AI system memories.
task.deliverable: Single-file HTML/CSS/JS mockup (or Figma-ready design spec) showing the /memory route with all key screens and interactions.
task.stack: HTML5 + Tailwind CSS (or vanilla CSS) + minimal JS for interactivity. No frameworks required.
task.responsive: Mobile-first. Stack drawer under cards on small screens.

layout.header: Hero section with Allura logo mark + page title 'What your system remembers' + 'Add Memory' button (coral)
layout.search: Full-width search bar with placeholder 'Search memories, topics, or agents...'
layout.main: Scrollable list of memory cards. Load more + results count footer.

structure: Status badge (top-left): Active | Forgotten | Pending | Deprecated — color-coded
Confidence bar (top-right): horizontal bar 0–100%, color-coded (green >75, amber 50–75, red <50)
Memory text: plain English, max 2 lines, 16px Inter
Meta row: 'Created 2 hours ago · by Scout'
Actions: 'View Source' text button (clarity blue) + 'Forget' text button (warm gray)

states.active: White card, subtle shadow, ink_black text
states.hover: Pure white background with 2px coral left border, slight lift shadow
states.low_confidence: Warning icon + amber confidence bar + tooltip 'Confidence below 50%'

memory_card.empty_state: Illustrated empty state: 'Nothing saved yet. Add the first memory.' with coral CTA button.

interactions.search: Real-time filter with 100ms debounce. Show 'No memories match "query". Save it manually?' if zero results.
interactions.view_source: Opens right-side provenance drawer (see screen: provenance_drawer).
interactions.forget: Moves card to 'Recently Forgotten' tab. 30-day recovery window.
interactions.load_more: Infinite scroll or 'Load more' button. Show count: 'Showing 24 of 156 memories'.

screens.title: Provenance Drawer (Right Panel)
screens.trigger: Click 'View Source' on any memory card

sections.name: Origin
sections.content: Agent avatar + name (e.g., 'Scout'), timestamp, workflow ID. Badge: 'Auto-captured' or 'User-added'.

sections.name: Evidence
sections.content: Collapsible list of raw trace cards. Each trace shows: tool call name, timestamp, snippet of LLM output or tool result. 'No traces available' if empty.

sections.name: Actions
sections.content: Buttons: 'Promote to Insight' (trust green), 'Deprecate' (coral), 'Edit' (clarity blue). Disabled states for insufficient permissions.

states.loading: Skeleton loader with text 'Finding source traces...'

screens.title: Curator Approval Queue

layout.left_panel: List of proposed insight cards. Each shows: summary (1 line), confidence %, trace count, timestamp.
layout.right_panel: Selected insight detail: full text, evidence list, confidence breakdown.

screens.empty_state: 'No insights waiting for review. Check back later.' with calm illustration.

graph_spec.library: React Flow (or D3 force-directed for HTML mockup)

interactions.pan_zoom: Mouse drag to pan, scroll to zoom. Fit-to-view button.
interactions.node_click: Opens memory card in right panel (same as provenance drawer).
interactions.search: Filter graph by node name. 'Show neighborhood' button for dense graphs.
interactions.too_big: If >50 nodes visible, show 'Show neighborhood' to focus on selected node + 2-hop neighbors.

writing_guidelines.reading_level: 6th grade for UI labels, 8th–10th for body copy

good: Nothing saved yet. Add the first memory.

labels.no_results: No memories match '{query}'. Save it manually?

data_hooks: Reuse existing useMemoryList hook for memory list
Create useProvenanceDrawer(memoryId) hook for drawer data
technical_requirements.graph: React Flow (force-directed), 100 nodes max, 20-node demo dataset
technical_requirements.performance: Infinite scroll, 100ms search debounce, <1s load with 100 memories
technical_requirements.responsive: Mobile-first. Drawer stacks below cards on <768px.

edge_cases.behavior: Empty state with illustration and 'Add Memory' CTA
'No memories match "query". Save it manually?' with suggestion link
Warning badge on card, amber confidence bar, tooltip on hover
'Source not available' in drawer with info icon
'Show neighborhood' button to focus on selected node + 2-hop neighbors
'No insights waiting for review. Check back later.' with calm illustration

acceptance_criteria: Memory cards show status badge + confidence bar + plain English text + meta + actions
Provenance drawer opens on 'View Source', shows origin/evidence/actions with loading/empty states
Curator queue has left/right layout with approve/edit/reject workflow
Graph tab renders 20-node demo with pan/zoom/node-click interactions
All UI text follows 6th-grade readability and active voice guidelines
Passes mobile responsive test: cards stack, drawer becomes bottom sheet, graph is scrollable
next_actions: Wire useProvenanceDrawer hook with mock data
Test empty states + low-confidence memory edge cases
Log design decision on mockup approval
